content.en:
"Really good luck!"

Ye Tian quickly collected this piece of Extreme Dao Gray Stone.

After all, he didn't know if there would be Extreme Path creatures entering here, so he had to quickly collect the Extreme Path Gray Stone to prevent it from being discovered by other Extreme Path creatures.

Once the Extreme Greystone is exposed, it will definitely cause many True Realm Perfect Masters to hunt down.

Such a large piece of Extreme Greystone is already worth as much as a Extreme Treasure.

And an Extreme Dao Treasure is enough to make the Perfect Controller of the True Realm crazy, if it is at the end of the realm, he dares to guarantee that the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm like the Lord of the Ancient can do it.

The end of the realm is too poor, so the perfect controller of the extreme realm lacks the extreme realm treasures!

Ye Tian felt that the Lord of the Ancient Dynasty did not necessarily possess an Extreme Dao Treasure, and even if he really had it, he was afraid that there would only be an Extreme Dao Treasure.

With this piece of Extreme Dao Gray Stone being taken away by Ye Tian, it means that the benefits here are gone.

So, Ye Tian quickly left here.

......

Time passed slowly, and the treasures in the inner perimeter of the Extreme Demon Ape Cemetery were almost gone.

And the place where the main tomb of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape is located is not allowed to enter, otherwise it will inevitably be punished by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

In the Extreme Deep Sea, no Extreme Creature dared to disobey the orders of the Extreme Deep Sea Palace, unless it was a spy.

Therefore, at this moment, there are not many areas that can be explored by the Extreme Creatures.

Core area.

A group of extreme creatures came here, but unfortunately there were no resources here, but soon after, they found an incomparably precious treasure.

Time and Space Pole Monument!

Moreover, it is also a high-level space-time pole Dao monument, such a treasure is suitable for people to comprehend the time pole and space pole path, and the speed of comprehension cultivation will be many times that of before!

For individuals, they can cultivate the Time Pole Dao and the Space Pole Dao to the Dacheng realm, or even the consummation realm, as soon as possible, and greatly improve their strength.

And for one side of the force, the value is even greater!

Although there are only a few forces under the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace and its command on the surface of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, there are many private forces.

Therefore, everyone is eager to obtain the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument!

Even if someone is not cultivating the Extreme Dao of Time and Space, it doesn't matter, trading with the Extreme Dao Creature, the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, can be exchanged for unimaginable benefits, such as exchanging a few Extreme Dao Treasures is more than enough.

When they saw this space-time Pole Monument, all the Pole creatures went crazy.

However, the space-time pole dao tablet contains the terrifying space-time pole dao, which is difficult to be included in the space treasures, unless you master the time pole and space pole of the consummation realm, you can take away the space-time pole path, otherwise you can only hold it in your hand.

This has caused a lot of trouble for taking away the Space-Time Pole Dao, and even if you grab it, it will be difficult to take it away.

For the first time, the Lord of Blood Demon snatched the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument.

"Lord of the Blood Demon, put down the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument for me!"

The Lord of the Stone Pupil and some other Extreme Creatures who perfectly controlled the True Realm struck one after another, instantly tearing apart the body of the Lord of the Blood Demon and severely injuring the Lord of the Blood Demon.

And the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument on the Blood Demon Lord's body was thrown out, and was grabbed by the huge claws of another Extreme Dao Creature who was the perfect controller of the True Realm.

But soon, another Extreme Dao creature at the level of the Perfect Controller of the True Realm snatched it again, but it was not saved soon.

The battle here is too chaotic, and from time to time, the Extreme Dao Creature, the perfect controller of the Realm, falls.

As for those extreme creatures at the level of super-perfect controllers, where do they dare to approach, unless they are looking for death.

Now.

Ye Tian also came here, but he didn't interfere, he knew very well that he couldn't interfere, and he couldn't take away the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument.

Abrupt.

The Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument was actually thrown to Ye Tian's side.

After Ye Tian sensed it, he withdrew as soon as possible, and there were a few extreme path creatures at the level of super perfect controllers who still had the intention of snatching, so they were reluctant to withdraw as soon as possible.

As a result, the attack of the Extreme Dao creatures, the perfect controller of the True Realm, struck, and these Extreme Dao creatures were instantly killed.

"These guys really don't care about everything, the weak will be killed!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Although the powerhouses of the Eternal Ruins are also very powerful, most of the dead are clones, and they can be condensed again, and the loss is not great.

But the extreme creatures here almost only have their own bodies, and they don't have clones, and once they die, they are really dead.

It can be said that the infighting in the Extreme Deep Sea is too serious, and I don't know how many super-perfect controllers and the perfect controllers of the three realms have fallen.

If the super-perfect controller of the Eternal Ruins had fallen at such a rate, there would have been no powerhouses for a long time.

However, there is no shortage of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers and Void Realm and True Realm Perfect Controllers, what they lack is Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, if a Extreme Realm Perfect Controller is born in such frequent battles, the Extreme Path Deep Sea Palace feels that it is worth it.

Ye Tian ran far away and watched the battle silently.

Abrupt.

A Realm Perfect Controller, the Extreme Dao Creature, accidentally shattered the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument, and then in the continuous battle, the Space-Time Pole Pole Monument shattered into many pieces.

Eventually, some of the Extreme Creatures snatched a piece of shard and fled.

Although the value of the fragment of the Space-Time Pole Dao Monument is far less than the value of a whole space-time Pole Monument, being able to snatch a fragment is a profit!

In a short period of time, the fragments of the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument were snatched away, and the Lord of the Stone Pupil snatched the most fragments.

However, from beginning to end, Ye Tian had no intention of snatching.

Soon after, some of the Extreme Path creatures left the Extreme Demon Ape Graveyard one after another.

Because there's nothing good here, there's no point in staying here any longer.

Ye Tian also left here, and after leaving the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Cemetery, he quickly disappeared.

......

Nine Rivers Void.

It took some time for Ye Tian's duplicate body to return here, it used to take Ye Tian a long time to go from the Origin Realm Sea to the Eternal Ruins, but now he came back quickly.

For the ultimate perfect controller, this is nothing at all.

At this time, Ye Tian brought back the Extreme Dao Gray Stone, preparing to integrate it into the Sword of the Super Perfect Treasure here, thus cultivating an Extreme Path Treasure.

"Let's hope we can make it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he took out the Extreme Path Greystone and fused it into the super-perfect Treasure Sword here.

Rumble!!!!

This super-grade perfect treasure that was being conceived slowly absorbed the power of the Extreme Greystone, and slowly began to transform, and even the time for it to be conceived accelerated.

"At this rate of gestation, it will definitely be possible to conceive in a billion eternal years. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Moreover, this super-grade perfect treasure is very likely to evolve into an extreme treasure.

Of course, it is not obvious yet, and it will take some time to evolve slowly.

"The most important thing at the moment is not this, it's my next common sense, if you can really do it, then you can earn it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Origin Realm Sea, Ye Tian's body is here.

Compared to before, Ye Tian can now enter the Origin Realm Sea, and as he breaks through to the Perfect Controller, the rules of the Origin Realm Sea have been perfected, and even evolved a wave, which can allow the Perfect Controller to enter the Origin Realm Sea, of course, it is the local Perfect Controller, and the Perfect Controller from the outside world still can't enter.

At this moment, Ye Tian was here ready to try to copy the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument.

That's right, he wants to use the new ability of the copying talent to copy all things to copy the space-time Extreme Dao Monument, if it is successful, it will be awesome!

But whether it can be replicated, he is not sure now.

But he didn't want to copy it in the Daoless Tower, and he didn't dare to copy it in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, so he could only copy it here in the safest and most remote Origin Realm Sea.

"Let's hope we can make it!"

Ye Tian muttered.
